title: Transport in Montserrat
content:
Railways: 0 km Highways: <br "total:" 269 km <br "paved:" 203 km <br "unpaved:" 66 km (1995) Waterways: none Ports and harbours: Plymouth (abandoned), Little Bay (anchorages and ferry landing), Carr's Bay Merchant marine: none (2002 est.)

<a href="List%20of%20airports%20in%20Montserrat" Airports</a: One, <a href="Gerald%27s%20Airport" Gerald's Airport</a, opened on 11 July 2005 replacing <a href="W.H.%20Bramble%20Airport" W.H. Bramble Airport</a which was destroyed by volcanic eruption in 1997.
